chain.thought: Explanation: Japan’s fastest time was 10.64 (Hiroyasu Tsuchie and Yuta Kanno), while Thailand’s fastest time was 10.72 (Reanchai Srihawong). Since 10.64 is faster (earlier) than 10.72, Japan finished earlier.

judge_thought: Explanation: The table reports individual athletes’ heat results rather than a single country-level finish. Both Japan and Thailand have multiple athletes competing in different heats (Japan: 10.64 in heats 1 and 2; Thailand: 10.87 in heat 1 and 10.72 in heat 3). Since there is no consolidated country finish order across heats and no head-to-head country metric is defined, the dataset does not provide a definitive basis to say one country “finished earlier” than the other. Therefore, responding with “null” appropriately reflects that the question is not determinable from the given table.
